message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Actor" as Actor1
participant "<<Analysis>>\nUIConditionalFormattingCellExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension
participant "<<Analysis>>\nUIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension
participant "<<Analysis>>\nConditionalFormattingCellPanel" as ConditionalFormattingCellPanel

Actor1 -> UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension : starts use case
activate UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension
UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension -> UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension : create()
activate UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension
UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension -> ConditionalFormattingCellPanel : create()
activate ConditionalFormattingCellPanel
ConditionalFormattingCellPanel --> Actor1 : shows side bar
deactivate ConditionalFormattingCellPanel
deactivate UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension
deactivate UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension

actor "Actor" as Actor2
participant "<<Analysis>>\nUIConditionalFormattingCellExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellExtension2
participant "<<Analysis>>\nUIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension" as UIConditionalFormattingCellSideBarExtension2
participant "<<Analysis>>\nConditionalFormattingCellPanel" as ConditionalFormattingCellPanel2

@enduml
```
